en.name: Huzhou Haode Import and Export Co.,Ltd.
en.intro: A textile export partner focused on upholstery, curtain, jacquard, chenille, linen-look, and decorative home fabrics. We help overseas buyers move from fabric direction to sampled, inspected, export-ready goods.
en.serviceNote: Send your target texture, color, width, composition, and usage. Our team will match suitable fabrics and prepare sample options.

zh.name: 湖州好德进出口有限公司
zh.intro: 专注家纺、沙发布、窗帘布、提花、雪尼尔、仿麻及装饰面料的外贸出口服务。从面料方向、样品开发、品质检验到出口交付，协助海外客户高效完成采购。
zh.serviceNote: 可提供目标肌理、颜色、门幅、成分和用途，我们会协助匹配面料并准备样品方案。
